= total system coherence. G, M, E, S, T, K, R, Q, F, C = the ten Super-Factors: Grace, Moral Alignment, Entropy, Specification, Time, Knowledge, Redemptive Order, Quantum Consciousness, Faith, Coherence. Plain English: Total reality coherence is the integrated coupling of ten named factors over space and time. Moral Superposition (Pre-Fall State)
= the pre-Fall moral state of the system.

= probability amplitudes for the two eigenstates. Both eigenstates exist as real possibilities until measurement collapses one. Plain English: Eden held both moral outcomes simultaneously real, awaiting the federal observer's measurement. Collapse Threshold (Candidate)
= information fidelity: how cleanly the observer received the system instruction.
= observer authority (federal role).

= proposed collapse threshold. Plain English: A measurement only collapses the system if both the observer's signal cleanliness and their authority are high enough that their product crosses the threshold. Eve's corrupted channel did not; Adam's direct instruction and federal role did. Lowe Coherence Lagrangian (LLC)
= time-dependent coherence after the Fall introduces a
= entropy drag on coherence.

= rate of change of the summed Super-Factors. Plain English: The post-Fall dynamical version of the Master Equation. The static pre-Fall integral becomes a time-evolving Lagrangian with an entropy decay term once collapse activates. PEAR-LAB Empirical Anchor
= statistical significance of the operator-intent / random-event-generator correlation over the multi-decade Princeton dataset.

= total trial count. Plain English: A real, replicated 6.35σ effect — small in magnitude but anchoring the empirical claim that consciousness is not a passive observer. Global Consciousness Project Anchor
= significance of the GCP correlation between coherent global attention and random-number-generator deviations.
= pre-registered global events. Plain English: A second independent dataset hitting the same observer-authority direction at high significance. Lifespan Decoherence Curve

= goodness-of-fit for the Genesis-lifespan decay model after the Fall. The pre-Flood patriarchs' lifespans track a high-fit decay pattern consistent with progressive decoherence. Plain English: A supporting (not load-bearing) pattern: the Genesis lifespan curve fits a decoherence-style decay extremely well. Glossary Key terms used in this article. Definitions are drawn from how the article itself uses each term. Master Equation (
) The degree of system alignment with the original specification. High coherence = the system is still in the basis it was made from. Pre-Fall: maximum. Post-Fall: decaying. Logos Field (

, inter-substrate coupling) that determines how the field acts on a subsystem. Distinct from the field itself: field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it.
